leaf_zones._archive-v1: archived v1 — superseded, kept for provenance

tonal-zoning.css.name: tonal-zoning.css
tonal-zoning.css.description: Demo page styles consuming zone tokens: .tz-doc/.tz-mast/.tz-registry/.tz-zone zone-showcase cards, .tz-roles component demos, .cvx-btn/chip/vi sample components, .ov-* applied-dashboard mockup layout.

tweaks-panel.jsx.name: tweaks-panel.jsx
tweaks-panel.jsx.description: Exports (to window) TweaksPanel + useTweaks and form controls (TweakSlider/Toggle/Radio/Select/Text/Number/Color/Button/Section/Row); a draggable floating panel that persists edits via postMessage to an omelette host.

glyph-corpus.json.name: glyph-corpus.json
glyph-corpus.json.description: Root data file (31KB, GENERATED by _system/emit_glyph_corpus.js — do not hand-edit): {_generated, _counts:{symbols:144,fields:76,total:220}, entries:[{address,text}]} — glyph://symbol/<id> entries (name/domain/kind/tags) and glyph://field/<facet>/<value> entries (feeling/senses), the embedding corpus for glyph meaning.

Tonal Zoning System.html.name: Tonal Zoning System.html
Tonal Zoning System.html.description: Standalone spec page: the 10-zone tonal registry, 6 component-role examples (primary/secondary/chip/Vi-rec/warning/reject), and a live-tweakable re-skinned Overview dashboard applying the zoning.

colors_and_type.css.name: colors_and_type.css
colors_and_type.css.description: Core token source: fonts.css import + --paper/--ink/--accent-gold/--accent-bronze/--accent-communication/--status-*/--border-*/--shadow-*/--r-*/--s-*/--font-*/--weight-* + .cv-h1..h4/.cv-body/.cv-caption presets; --zone-* surface-zone registry (surface/strong/edge/ink per zone) + --vi-*/--comm-* + palette variants + .zone-* helper classes.

styles.css.name: styles.css
styles.css.description: Root entry stylesheet: @imports colors_and_type.css + all tokens/*.css files + core/containers.css in dependency order; contains no rules of its own.

face-index.js.name: face-index.js
face-index.js.description: window.CV_FACES: GENERATED map keyed by Studio thing id; each face carries {address,title,faceof,excerpt,url,rel:{source,edge:{kind (from CV_EDGES)},target}} so the relational marker between a thing and its doc page is composed by CV_GLYPHIC.composeRelation, not hand-drawn (currently seeded with one entry, 'colors').

_adherence.oxlintrc.json.name: _adherence.oxlintrc.json
_adherence.oxlintrc.json.description: oxlint config (react+import plugins): 1 no-restricted-imports rule blocking ~30 internal path globs (funnels imports through index.js, exempted via override), plus 1 no-restricted-syntax rule with 38 selectors — 3 generic (raw hex/px literals, disallowed font-family) and 35 JSX prop/enum-validators across 18 DS components (Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, ContainmentTree, DiagramSolver, Glyphic, Input, Modal, etc.); an x-omelette block lists those components plus a long CSS custom-property token allowlist.

index.js.name: index.js
index.js.description: Exports getDS(), getRegistry(id), listRegistries(), BUNDLE_GLOBAL, REGISTRY_GLOBALS — loud-fail accessors onto the compiled window-mounted bundle and 11 window.CV_* registries; does no work at import time.

system/axis-system.html.name: axis-system.html
system/axis-system.html.description: Live projection of window.CV_AXES: renders every registered axis (colour, space, size, motion, texture, depth, fill, form, symbol) as grouped value previews with token names, demonstrating each axis's full value set and its token-driven grammar.

system/colour-axis.html.name: colour-axis.html
system/colour-axis.html.description: Demonstrates the colour axis as a relational graph: families (voice vs structure, pairing rules), self-describing values (token, roles, theme-invariance, aliases) via CV_AXES.resolve('color'), and per-component-type colour subscriptions (glyphic vs surface) resolved live through candidates(slotRule).

system/gl-inspector.js.name: gl-inspector.js
system/gl-inspector.js.description: A dev-only overlay panel for the skin-system's WebGL scene mode: exposes Camera/Lighting/Material/Relief dial groups that read/write --gl-* CSS custom properties directly on the stage element (a live projection of the token registry, holding no state of its own), visible only while the scene is in GL mode.

system/type-system.html.name: type-system.html
system/type-system.html.description: Live projection of window.CV_REGISTRY: every universal component type (Glyphic, the 11 UI components, panels/graph/slide kinds, block/surface/doc library) shown with its parts, value-slots (axis subscriptions) and sockets (typed attachment points), plus the single-inheritance 'extends' lineage trees — demonstrating one grammar covering the whole component surface.

system/glyphic-parts.html.name: glyphic-parts.html
system/glyphic-parts.html.description: Demonstrates a glyphic as three independent, separately-styleable layered parts (ring, fill, symbol) — each with its own colour/texture/motion — composed by a layered SVG compositor and edited by the one inspector's per-part sections (whole, ring, fill, symbol groups).

system/glyphic-system.html.name: glyphic-system.html
system/glyphic-system.html.description: The master living-spec document for the whole compositional model: defines the Glyphic as a stack of orthogonal token-driven facets (form/symbol/fill/colour/texture/motion/size/depth), walks through slots vs sockets, anatomy, the universal-component unification (one node type spanning glyphic/token/panel/slide), decorators registry, the action layer (click-or-talk), self-growth via the system's own verbs, and query-projected collection UIs — annotated inline with '· BUILT' status markers tracking implementation progress against the original brief.

system/glyphgraph-generator.html.name: glyphgraph-generator.html
system/glyphgraph-generator.html.description: A 'write by meaning' tool: free-text sentences describing entities and relations (is/part-of/before/with/could) are parsed into a glyphgraph, rendered via the real DiagramSolver and read back into English via CV_MEANING.readGraph, with a meaning panel to adjust facets/relations and an AI-assist strip for graph edits and icon generation.

system/studio.css.name: studio.css
system/studio.css.description: Shared stylesheet for the Studio app shell (studio.html/studio-ng.html): defines CSS custom-property aliases onto the design tokens and lays out the topbar/mode-toggle/rail/canvas/inspect-panel grid used by both Studio variants.

system/system-map.json.name: system-map.json
system/system-map.json.description: Generated data feeding system-map.html: {nodes[] (1460 file/folder records with id/path/parent/type/ext/role/size/defines/uses), edges[] (2844 contains/loads/resolves records), globals[] (49 window.CV_* → defining-file records), roleCounts{}, encoding, scanned[] (353 source files), generatedAt, version:2}.

system/studio-ng.html.name: studio-ng.html
system/studio-ng.html.description: Same Studio app as studio.html (Make/Build modes, chat+click composer, tool-schema/context dev panes) but with its editing column now driven by the generic CV_INSPECTOR (projection-driven) instead of the bespoke inspector, kept side-by-side with studio.html to verify parity before the bespoke renderer is retired.

system/the-whole-thing.html.name: the-whole-thing.html
system/the-whole-thing.html.description: A narrative synthesis document ('the vision walked in its own laws') walking through the frame law, the one language, convergent 'rooms', the fusion map, the instrument-as-genesis, the interface thesis and remaining gaps — written as one chained argument citing live glyphgraph renders, law-matrix tables, and citizenship/coverage stat bars; authored by the design/language agent after a full lineage review, attributed to Tim Geldard.

system/skin-system.html.name: skin-system.html
system/skin-system.html.description: Demonstrates the SKIN registry: one block/graph-layout composition (a hub-and-satellite node graph with luminous connector threads) re-skinning across registered materials (glass, stone/champagne-plaster+porcelain per reference boards, carbon) including a GL-lit 3D scene mode, selected/potential/stacked states, and an AI wall-generation entry point (cvComposeWall).

system/system-atlas.html.name: system-atlas.html
system/system-atlas.html.description: An explorable, searchable directory-tree map of the whole repo: every real folder/file as a clickable tree row labelled with its inferred system role, with a detail pane showing live full contents (tokens, axis values, types, components) for whatever is selected.

system/root-unity-mark.html.name: root-unity-mark.html
system/root-unity-mark.html.description: Presents the single brand mark (√ unit — a square/ring/centre-symbol radicand mirroring the Glyphic anatomy itself) in three placements (canvas/gold/dark) plus a wordmark lockup, all rendered from the one source function CV_ROOT_UNITY_MARK.svg().

system/build-system-map.js.name: build-system-map.js
system/build-system-map.js.description: The canonical generator for system-map.json: scans the repo filesystem (given ls/readFile), classifies every file's 'role' by path/extension convention, extracts defines/uses (window.CV_* globals) to build contains/loads/resolves edges, and emits the versioned {nodes,edges,globals,roleCounts,scanned,generatedAt,version} model that system-map.html renders — never hand-edited.

system/language.html.name: language.html
system/language.html.description: Demonstrates the Glyphic Language: marks compute and display their own English 'read-out' sentence from their facet values via the meaning registry (cv-meaning), including fill-mode-changes-meaning, a two-node relation whose edge line-style encodes mood, and a full glyphgraph (via DiagramSolver) whose paragraph is generated live from the same graph object driving the drawing.

system/glyphic-foundry.html.name: glyphic-foundry.html
system/glyphic-foundry.html.description: A conversational AI symbol-generation studio: describe a needed icon, Vi (via CV_AI.execute) proposes multiple live-rendered glyphic candidates in a chat thread, iterate by feedback, then Save adds the chosen symbol into the shared icon library (feeding the Symbol axis / icon explorer instantly).

system/inspector.html.name: inspector.html
system/inspector.html.description: Demonstrates window.CV_INSPECTOR as one projection-driven editor working unmodified across three different kinds (a glyphic mark, a composition-menu panel with sockets, and a colour token leaf-node), each column reading CV_PROJECT.toInspector(node) and previewing every option by rendering it through CV_NODE.render — proving no per-kind editor code is needed.

system/block-system.html.name: block-system.html
system/block-system.html.description: Demonstrates the Block as the universal container type: grounds/material surfaces (glass/velum/parchment/stone), depth-coordinate levels, ordered content/action sockets holding typed occupants (text, glyphic, row, num), rendered live via CV_BLOCK.chrome() with dial controls (material, density, theme, ground texture) and the one CV_INSPECTOR editing a live block instance.

system/studio.html.name: studio.html
system/studio.html.description: The 'Root Unity Studio' interactive editor app: a Make view (for end users) and a Build view (for system authors) as two audience-projections of the same node, with a stage that renders the live glyphic, a chat/voice composer routed through CV_ACTIONS/CV_AI, and dev panes showing the same node as AI tool-schema and shared context — demonstrating talk-and-click as one action layer.

system/system-map.html.name: system-map.html
system/system-map.html.description: An interactive treemap/network visualizer of the entire codebase (from system-map.json): nested folders/files as squarified boxes sized and coloured by role/metric, with resolution/loads/contains edge overlays, radial/tunnel layout modes, zoom/pan, an edit mode (create/rename/move/archive/delete queued as ops), and undo/redo — a live, editable map of how the system's files wire together.

app/registry.css.name: registry.css
app/registry.css.description: registry.css (2138 lines) — styles for the Universal Type Registry UI: layer badges/provenance pills, type chips/cards, slot lists, Registry canvas grid+rail, Type Builder (tb-* split panes/wizard/modal/preview-by-archetype), Architecture canvas (ladder, slot example, lineage, types-vs-templates, consumers table, entry points), and universal TypeThumb preview styles per layer (token/atom/block/system/surface incl. surface-widget context mockups and surface-step wizard frames).

app/index.html.name: index.html
app/index.html.description: index.html — Studio's entry point: mounts #app via ReactDOM, loads React/ReactDOM/Babel-standalone from CDN, then in strict order the core engine (graph-layout/world-camera/morph/layout-fit + fetched-and-Babel-transpiled DiagramSolver/ContainmentTree/Slide/RenderType), the icon+Glyphic stack, all universal axes (color/space/size/motion/texture/depth/material/flow/level/density/skin/ground/fill/form/symbol), the Type Registry scripts, AI services+registry, CV_HOST runtime, shared components/*.jsx, all canvases/*.jsx, then App.jsx; also defines the data-skin='glass' world-camera MutationObserver and window.cvSetSkin.

app/workshop.css.name: workshop.css
app/workshop.css.description: workshop.css (3555 lines) — styles for the Workshop document editor: doc-type picker, 3-pane ws-workspace (library rail/doc/outline rail), asset library tabs+search+drag tiles, section toolbar+variations carousel, 16:9 ws-slide-stage/frame with dark/gold bleed color flips, background motifs (paper/blueprint/edgeband/ink/goldBleed), and the full catalogue of slide block styles (hero, headline, quote, icons, stats, palette, button, callout, process, imagegrid, feature cards, funnel, cluster, pullquote, metric-row, bullets, iconstrip, labeledcard, comparison, hexbadges, chiprow, statpills, stattable, checklist and more).

app/app.css.name: app.css
app/app.css.description: app.css — Studio shell layout: .dsa-shell 3-column grid (sidebar/main/chat), side-nav item states+pulse dot, canvas header/body, .dsa-btn variants, stat-grid/activity-feed/canvas-tile cards (Overview), inbox drop-zone+list, icon grid/generation panel, color-swatch grid, .dsa-chat rail (messages/composer/suggested pills), stub-canvas, and .dsa-toast (has a duplicate/orphaned second .dsa-toast rule block with stray declarations near file end, likely a leftover unmerged edit).

app/App.jsx.name: App.jsx
app/App.jsx.description: App.jsx — root component: holds all persisted app state (inbox, generated icons/components, color/pattern edits+locks, templates, workshop docs, palette/pattern snapshots) via usePersisted, wires global window.cvNav and Cmd+K palette listeners, applies colorEdits/patternEdits to :root CSS vars, routes `active` to the matching canvas component, and renders the Sidebar/ChatRail/Toast/ExportPatch/CommandPalette/SaveAsTypeModal shell.

app/imagery.css.name: imagery.css
app/imagery.css.description: imagery.css — styles for Imagery/AI Studio/Settings/Editor/360-viewer: cv-im-* tab bar, image grid+card overlay actions, empty states, Projects/Hubs two-col layout with pano-strip + hotspot rows, Pano360 pin/ring markers, then the larger 'AI STUDIO v3' cv-as-* system (resizable rail/stage, prompt/source/compose panels, param pills, run bar, results grid, chat sub-panel, modals), plus MaskEditor (cv-mask-*) and ImageEditor (cv-ed-*) modal-sheet styles (crop overlay, filter grid, slider, ratios, rotate row, AI-edit textarea+results).

app/deck.css.name: deck.css
app/deck.css.description: deck.css — brand primitive classes extracted from the pitch deck for reuse: surfaces (cv-paper/panel/card/plate), hatch+blueprint background patterns, deck typography (title/section/eyebrow/body/stat), gold bullet/check lists, pill/tag badges, dashed-rule connectors, the V watermark mark, two-column cv-compare, cv-section-head/panel-head, entity cv-shape wrapper, layout utility classes (stack/row/spacer), and .cv-gutter (drag handle used by the Resizable component).

app/ai/ai-capabilities-canvas.js.name: ai-capabilities-canvas.js
app/ai/ai-capabilities-canvas.js.description: Bulk-registers ~26 per-canvas CV_AI text capabilities (color/icon/voice/pattern/component/build/deck/widget/wizard/type/inbox/chat) plus 2 image capabilities sharing generic runText/runImgGen/runImgEdit runners, plus one bespoke deck.titlechain capability that writes deck slide titles as one continuing sentence.

app/ai/ai-studio.js.name: ai-studio.js
app/ai/ai-studio.js.description: Registers Studio-specific CV_AI entries: voice.openai and provider.local providers (both CV_HOST-delegated), context.studio resolver projecting CV_PROJECT.toContext(state), and studio.command capability turning a natural-language instruction into one action call via CV_PROJECT.toToolSchema.

app/ai/host-runtime.js.name: host-runtime.js
app/ai/host-runtime.js.description: Defines window.CV_HOST, the Environment/Host registry: pluggable runtimes (review sandbox floor, fsapi browser File System Access, native/MCP host) ranked by capability, a uniform read/list/write op surface with loud failure, a change-staging store (changes.propose/apply/reject), commit() (stage-then-write-or-handoff), serializer registration/dispatch (registerSerializer/serialize), and describe() self-documentation; bridges CV_AI.resolveProvider via resolveProviderRuntime.

app/ai/host-serializer.js.name: host-serializer.js
app/ai/host-serializer.js.description: Registers CV_HOST serializers (ai.entry, type, css.token, card, file — each rendering a change payload to exact source text via a js() JS-literal formatter) and CV_AI repo capabilities (host-fs provider, native-model/mcp-tools providers, repo.read, repo.list, ds.propose, ds.apply) so Vi can author real diffs into the repo.

app/ai/ai-glyphic.js.name: ai-glyphic.js
app/ai/ai-glyphic.js.description: Registers two CV_AI capabilities: glyphic.generate (proposes N candidate 24px SVG icon symbol records from a brief, via Company role glyph_symbol_candidates or fallback prompt/complete path, validated by CV_GLYPHIC.validateSymbol) and glyphic.save (commits a chosen candidate into CV_ICONS.add with provenance 'vi').

app/ai/ai-layout.js.name: ai-layout.js
app/ai/ai-layout.js.description: Registers CV_AI capability layout.compose: prompts an LLM for a relational graph-wall spec (nodes with hub/orbit/col/fx,fy placement + threads) from a brief, validated by validate() against CV_BLOCK levels/glyph ids/text roles/chart kinds; exports the grammar as window.CV_LAYOUT_GRAMMAR.

app/ai/ai-registry.js.name: ai-registry.js
app/ai/ai-registry.js.description: Defines window.CV_AI, the Universal AI Registry: a CV_REGISTRY-mirrored store of provider/behaviour/skill/capability/context entries with register/query/resolve/lineage, provider resolution (resolveProvider, incl. CV_HOST delegation), role-indirection (providerForRole/setRoleProvider), context resolution, behaviour composition, and execute() implementing ai-output = f(capability, context, params).

app/ai/ai-glyphic-language.js.name: ai-glyphic-language.js
app/ai/ai-glyphic-language.js.description: Registers CV_AI capabilities wrapping CV_MEANING's authoring/read API (glyphic.author, -author-relation, -author-gloss, glyphic.read, glyphic.describe) plus glyphic.assist (turns a natural instruction into typed, registry-validated graph ops via Company role glyph_assist, atomic loud-fail) and a context.glyphic resolver projecting the active meaning profile.

app/ai/ai-imagery.js.name: ai-imagery.js
app/ai/ai-imagery.js.description: Registers CV_AI capability imagery.render: builds an image-generation prompt from a skeleton + per-skin (stone/glass) palette fragments resolved from the live skin axis tokens, then calls the openai-image provider's generateImage() for a transparent-background product render.

app/ai/ai-seed.js.name: ai-seed.js
app/ai/ai-seed.js.description: Seeds CV_AI built-ins that don't need composer helpers: providers (claude, openai-image, company, local-swarm, vision), behaviours (voice.conceptv, copy.budgets, angle, diversity), 7 transform skills + skill.theme, context resolvers (generic/pages/widget/wizard), and image.generate/image.edit capabilities.

app/ai/ai-block.js.name: ai-block.js
app/ai/ai-block.js.description: Registers CV_AI capability block.compose: prompts an LLM to emit a nested container-block JSON tree (level/material/tint/arrange/sockets) from a brief, validated against CV_AXES + CV_BLOCK ladder/socket rules via validate(); parse() extracts and checks JSON, no hand-styling.

app/components/usePersisted.js.name: usePersisted.js
app/components/usePersisted.js.description: usePersisted.js — exports usePersisted(key,default) hook (localStorage-synced state) + cvStudioStorage.getAll()/clear() for namespaced 'cvstudio:' keys.

app/components/Resizable.jsx.name: Resizable.jsx
app/components/Resizable.jsx.description: Resizable.jsx — exports Resizable({cols,storageKey}) component: draggable-gutter multi-column split layout, persists non-flex column widths to localStorage.

app/components/CanvasHeader.jsx.name: CanvasHeader.jsx
app/components/CanvasHeader.jsx.description: CanvasHeader.jsx — exports CanvasHeader({title,sub,actions}), a small stateless header block (title/subtitle/action row) reused atop every canvas.

app/components/ImageEditor.jsx.name: ImageEditor.jsx
app/components/ImageEditor.jsx.description: ImageEditor.jsx — exports ImageEditor({image,onSave,onClose}): full-screen modal canvas editor (adjust/crop-rotate/AI-edit tabs), bakes filters+crop+rotation to a data URL via canvas, AI tab calls window.CV_AI openai-image edit.

app/components/ExportPatch.jsx.name: ExportPatch.jsx
app/components/ExportPatch.jsx.description: ExportPatch.jsx — exports ExportPatch({open,onClose,generatedIcons,extraColors,colorEdits,patternEdits}): modal that renders copy/download-able JS+CSS patch snippets for icons/colors/patterns pending manual application to source files.

app/components/KitPreviews.jsx.name: KitPreviews.jsx
app/components/KitPreviews.jsx.description: KitPreviews.jsx — exports KitPreviews({tokens}): renders 3 static mini-thumbnails (Platform/Virtual Hub/Vi workspace) driven by CSS custom properties, for live token-edit preview in the Colors canvas.

app/components/Pano360.jsx.name: Pano360.jsx
app/components/Pano360.jsx.description: Pano360.jsx — exports Pano360({src,hotspots,onAddHotspot,...}): lazy-loads three.js from CDN, renders an equirectangular sphere with drag-to-look, wheel-zoom, and clickable/editable hotspot pins.

app/components/CommandPalette.jsx.name: CommandPalette.jsx
app/components/CommandPalette.jsx.description: CommandPalette.jsx — exports CommandPalette({open,onClose,nav,openExport,copyText}): Cmd+K fuzzy-search overlay indexing canvases, actions, icons, base colors, and voice rules.

app/components/Sidebar.jsx.name: Sidebar.jsx
app/components/Sidebar.jsx.description: Sidebar.jsx — exports Sidebar({active,onSelect,counts,onOpenSearch,onCollapse}): left nav rendering NAV_SECTIONS (Workspace/System/Foundations/Build with/AI & settings) with per-item counts and a system-health footer.

app/components/ViShape.jsx.name: ViShape.jsx
app/components/ViShape.jsx.description: ViShape.jsx — exports ViShape({size,animated,color}): the Vi diamond-mark SVG glyph (polygon + hatched pattern fill, optional animated opacity), reused as logo/chip/button icon everywhere.

app/components/RefinePop.jsx.name: RefinePop.jsx
app/components/RefinePop.jsx.description: RefinePop.jsx — exports window.RefinePop({onRefine,disabled,placeholder,mode}): small popover (dot or pill trigger) with a textarea to submit a per-item AI refine instruction.

app/components/ChatRail.jsx.name: ChatRail.jsx
app/components/ChatRail.jsx.description: ChatRail.jsx — exports ChatRail({scope,onAction}): persistent right-rail Vi chat; routes image-generation intent to CV_AI openai-image, workshop-doc edit intent to WS_AI diff proposals, else calls CV_AI.complete with a hardcoded ConceptV brand SYSTEM_CONTEXT prompt.

app/components/MaskEditor.jsx.name: MaskEditor.jsx
app/components/MaskEditor.jsx.description: MaskEditor.jsx — exports MaskEditor({src,height,onChange}): canvas brush/eraser mask editor producing an alpha-channel PNG blob (transparent = edit area) per OpenAI images/edits mask spec.

app/components/Toast.jsx.name: Toast.jsx
app/components/Toast.jsx.description: Toast.jsx — exports Toast() + global window.dsaToast(msg): single shared bottom-center toast notifier via a module-level listener array, auto-hides after 2.2s.

app/registry/types-ui.jsx.name: types-ui.jsx
app/registry/types-ui.jsx.description: Shared Type-Registry UI primitives (TypeLayerBadge, TypeProvBadge, TypeChip, TypeCard, TypeLineageStrip, SlotAcceptsHint, TypeSlotList, TypeFilterBar, TypeTree/TypeTreeNode) exposed on window — badges, cards, filter bar and a layer-grouped inheritance tree for browsing CV_REGISTRY Types.

app/registry/glyphic-type.js.name: glyphic-type.js
app/registry/glyphic-type.js.description: Registers the 'glyphic' universal-component Type (ring+fill+symbol parts, size/motion/depth/value slots, ring/symbol sockets, dataSlots) into CV_REGISTRY, reading its value vocabularies live from CV_AXES/CV_GLYPHIC rather than duplicating them; exposes R.glyphic = { type(), valuesFor(facet) }.

app/registry/project.js.name: project.js
app/registry/project.js.description: window.CV_PROJECT: the shared node→projection layer — toInspector(node) builds a UI descriptor (slots/wholeSlots/partGroups/sockets/actions/decorators), toToolSchema(node) builds an AI function-calling schema from the same CV_ACTIONS data, toContext(state) builds the shared context blob, coherent() checks UI/AI action-set parity, and toCollection(view) generates list/palette rows from a CV_QUERY-backed view spec.

app/registry/types-seed.js.name: types-seed.js
app/registry/types-seed.js.description: Seeds CV_REGISTRY's built-in catalogue across every layer: color/type/shape tokens, icon/status/shape/stamp atoms, WS_BLOCKS-mirrored block Types, widget systems (kpi/media/hybrid), widget/wizard-step/deck-slide surfaces, doc Types (deck/brochure/widget/wizard) and wizard kinds, pulling deck-slide archetypes from window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG (throws if missing) and hydrating block defaults from window.WS_BLOCKS once loaded.

app/registry/actions.js.name: actions.js
app/registry/actions.js.description: window.CV_ACTIONS: verb/action registry (register/invoke/inverse/applicable/paramOptions) resolving args via CV_VARS, checking conditions via CV_COND; seeds ~15 built-in actions plus meta 'define-*' actions that let the interface author kinds/fields/relations/rules/decorators/axes/triggers/actions/macros into other registries.

app/registry/SaveAsTypeModal.jsx.name: SaveAsTypeModal.jsx
app/registry/SaveAsTypeModal.jsx.description: React modal component window.SaveAsTypeModal: reviews/edits a Vi-extracted Type draft (name/id/layer/family/variables) then calls window.CV_REGISTRY.register on Save.

app/registry/query.js.name: query.js
app/registry/query.js.description: window.CV_QUERY: generic cross-registry query facade (from/find/where over named sources ai/types/actions/decorators/axes/events) plus relations()/relation(), the generalized 'derive-by-query' pattern replacing hardcoded kind→capability maps with a live field-based lookup.

app/registry/types-adapter.js.name: types-adapter.js
app/registry/types-adapter.js.description: Bridges CV_REGISTRY Types to legacy global arrays (WIDGET_KINDS, WIDGET_SYSTEMS, WIZARD_KINDS, STEP_KINDS, WS_BLOCKS) by rebuilding them from registry queries on every change/boot-tick, and exposes window.CV_TYPES_SAVE (promote widget/wizard/step/block instances to Types) plus window.CV_TYPES_PROMPT (open/subscribe for the Save-as-Type modal).

app/registry/text-type.js.name: text-type.js
app/registry/text-type.js.description: Registers the 'text' typed-text primitive Type (role + color valueSlots, roles: micro/label/title/desc/body/src) into CV_REGISTRY and registers a CV_NODE solver mapping role→'.t-<role>' class + optional ink color; exposes R.text = { type(), roles, ensureSolver() }.

app/registry/relationships-seed.js.name: relationships-seed.js
app/registry/relationships-seed.js.description: Seeds 'relationship.<kind>' Types into CV_REGISTRY for every glyphgraph edge kind (reconciled from CV_EDGES.ids() union CV_MEANING edge.* fields), each carrying mirrored means/symbol/directed/inverse metadata and source/target sockets accepting glyphic/atom/block node classes; exposes window.CV_RELATIONSHIPS_SEED.ids.

app/registry/types-hooks.js.name: types-hooks.js
app/registry/types-hooks.js.description: React hooks over CV_REGISTRY — useTypes(filter), useType(id), useResolvedType(id), useLineage(id), useChildren(id), useRegistryActions() — each re-rendering on R.subscribe registry-change notifications; exposed as window.use*.

app/registry/types-thumb.jsx.name: types-thumb.jsx
app/registry/types-thumb.jsx.description: window.TypeThumb (+ ScaledThumb, RenderShape, ThumbPlaceholder): universal thumbnail renderer dispatching by layer/family/runtime to ~20 per-kind thumb components (tokens, atoms, blocks, systems, surfaces, docs, templates), rendering blocks/systems/slides through the shared core render engine (window.__cvRenderType) when ready, else via WidgetRender/WS_BLOCKS or hand-drawn mock chrome.

app/registry/views.js.name: views.js
app/registry/views.js.description: Seeds 7 built-in 'view' kind Types into CV_REGISTRY (view.library, view.palette-form/-symbol/-color, view.actions, view.decorators, view.views) each declaring a CV_QUERY spec + optional onPick action, consumed by CV_PROJECT.toCollection to generate palettes/libraries/menus from live registry data.

app/registry/vars.js.name: vars.js
app/registry/vars.js.description: window.CV_VARS: the single variable-resolution mechanism — resolve(spec,ctx)/resolveAll/isDynamic/getPath — handling literals, '{{ path }}' interpolation strings (with '| default' fallback), {var}, {ref} (registry lookup), {query} (CV_QUERY derive-by-query), and {op} (join/eq/not/coalesce/concat/length) computed specs.

app/registry/components-type.js.name: components-type.js
app/registry/components-type.js.description: Registers ~24 React UI components (button, badge, avatar, card, input, switch, tabs, segmented, stepper, modal, popover, select, tooltip, toast, sheet, list, menu, checkbox, radio, appshell, table, search, skeleton) as CV_REGISTRY Types with valueSlots/sockets/classification, each pointing at the shared React bundle namespace for rendering.

app/registry/kinds-type.js.name: kinds-type.js
app/registry/kinds-type.js.description: Registers 4 further universal-component kinds into CV_REGISTRY: panel.composition-menu (an insertable-item palette panel), kind.graph (thin wrapper Type pointing at the DiagramSolver engine), kind.slide-system (wrapper Type pointing at the Slide/deck-slide engine), and kind.selection (a selection-as-node Type with a members socket).

app/registry/types-vi.js.name: types-vi.js
app/registry/types-vi.js.description: window.CV_TYPES_VI: AI-assisted Type authoring helpers — proposeType() (brief+parent → draft Type JSON via CV_AI 'type.propose'), promoteInstance() (instance → reusable Type + extracted variables via 'type.materialize'), suggestSlots() (existing Type → suggested new slots via 'type.suggest-slots'), each parsing loose JSON from the AI reply.

app/registry/decorators.js.name: decorators.js
app/registry/decorators.js.description: window.CV_DECORATORS: cross-cutting @decorator vocabulary registry (register/query/decoratorsOf/applicable/find/decorate/run/parseAnnotations) seeded with ~18 retrospective decorators (kind, layer, classification, tags, provenance, axis, token, zero, socket flags, condition, generatable, editable, @dsCard/@template annotations) each deriving its value from an existing node field rather than storing a copy.

app/registry/types-core.js.name: types-core.js
app/registry/types-core.js.description: window.CV_REGISTRY: the core universal Type Registry (register/registerMany/update/remove/revert/get/all/query/resolve/lineage/children/descendants/accepts/candidatesForSlot/socketInfo/subscribe) with built-in/user/template Maps, localStorage persistence for user+template types, single-inheritance resolution via `extends`, and slot/socket acceptance checks by axis-value or classification.

app/registry/inspector.js.name: inspector.js
app/registry/inspector.js.description: window.CV_INSPECTOR: the one generic node-editing UI (mount(el,opts)/describe(target,opts)) that renders CV_PROJECT.toInspector output — value-slot tiles (previewed by re-rendering the node via CV_NODE), socket drop-candidates, decorator badges, and action buttons — routing all edits through CV_ACTIONS.invoke.

app/registry/events.js.name: events.js
app/registry/events.js.description: window.CV_EVENTS: trigger/event-bus registry (register/emit/on/subscribe) mapping an 'on' event + optional CV_COND 'when' to a CV_ACTIONS 'do' invocation with CV_VARS-resolved args; seeds 3 built-in triggers wiring ai.focus/ai.blur/selection.change to the 'highlight' action.

app/registry/block-type.js.name: block-type.js
app/registry/block-type.js.description: Registers the 'block' universal-component Type (container/zone) into CV_REGISTRY with ground/surface parts, containment-ladder level axis, ordered content+action sockets, and exposes window.CV_BLOCK = { chrome(spec), walk(spec,fn), levels(), orderedSockets() } — a solver computing block chrome (material/depth/keyline/arrange) from axis values.

app/registry/conditions.js.name: conditions.js
app/registry/conditions.js.description: window.CV_COND: shared condition evaluator (test/testAll/failures/normalize) supporting structured {field,op,value}/all/any/not trees, a string DSL ('a != b', 'a requires b', and/or), and predicate functions, with a small op set (==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, in, !in, exists, !exists, truthy, falsy).

app/canvases/Components.jsx.name: Components.jsx

ui_kits/platform/TopBar.jsx.name: TopBar.jsx

ui_kits/platform/screens/Gallery.jsx.name: Gallery.jsx
ui_kits/platform/screens/Gallery.jsx.description: Exports Gallery (and internal MediaTile) — image/video grid screen with a toolbar, selectable tiles (15 image placeholders + 5 video placeholders), and a grid/list view toggle.

ui_kits/platform/screens/BrandKit.jsx.name: BrandKit.jsx
ui_kits/platform/screens/BrandKit.jsx.description: Exports BrandKit (and internal ColourRow) — customer brand-kit form: logo dropzones, company-name input with live URL preview, a colour-scheme list, and a live style preview card.

ui_kits/platform/screens/Calendar.jsx.name: Calendar.jsx
ui_kits/platform/screens/Calendar.jsx.description: Exports CalendarScreen (and internal TopTask/CalChip/Day) — calendar screen with a toolbar, a 'Top Tasks & Reminders' horizontal card row, month nav, and a hardcoded June 2026 week grid with coloured task chips.

ui_kits/platform/screens/HubSettings.jsx.name: HubSettings.jsx
ui_kits/platform/screens/HubSettings.jsx.description: Exports HubSettings — Virtual Hub settings form: hub name/meta description fields with URL preview, toggleable Menu/Navigation option checkboxes with preview panes, and Link-Hubs style/stage/hub-switch checkboxes.

ui_kits/platform/screens/Stub.jsx.name: Stub.jsx

templates/capital-raise/support.js.name: support.js
templates/capital-raise/support.js.description: Generated dc-runtime bundle (from dc-runtime/src/*.ts) — parses <x-dc> template docs, loads React/ReactDOM UMD, boots the DCLogic component runtime; identical to pitch-deck/support.js.

templates/capital-raise/ds-base.js.name: ds-base.js
templates/capital-raise/ds-base.js.description: Injects the design system into the template: sets data-skin=glass default, links 19 individual token CSS files + core/containers.css + styles.css, loads cv-shapes.js/cv-icons.js, the compiled _ds_bundle.js, and core/slide-fit.js.

templates/capital-raise/CapitalRaise.dc..name: CapitalRaise.dc.html
templates/capital-raise/CapitalRaise.dc..description: A .dc template: 16-slide investor capital-raise deck defined as content-as-data (DECK array of archetype+content objects) rendered via <x-import> Slide components, with IntersectionObserver reveal animation and slide-fit sizing logic.

templates/pitch-deck/support.js.name: support.js
templates/pitch-deck/support.js.description: Generated dc-runtime bundle, byte-identical to templates/capital-raise/support.js (same dc-runtime build).

templates/pitch-deck/PitchDeck.dc.html.name: PitchDeck.dc.html
templates/pitch-deck/PitchDeck.dc.html.description: A .dc template: 10-slide investor pitch deck defined as content-as-data (DECK array of archetype+content objects) rendered via <x-import> Slide components, with IntersectionObserver reveal animation.

templates/pitch-deck/ds-base.js.name: ds-base.js
templates/pitch-deck/ds-base.js.description: Injects the design system into the template: sets data-skin=glass default, links only the aggregated styles.css (which @imports all token files), loads cv-shapes.js/cv-icons.js, _ds_bundle.js, and slide-fit.js — functionally same as capital-raise's ds-base.js but via one CSS entrypoint instead of 19 separate links.

atomicity/Home.jsx.name: Home.jsx
atomicity/Home.jsx.description: React component AcHome (window.AcHome) — landing screen with 3 door buttons (foundations/explore/ingest) + Vi CTA + a static brand snapshot (palette swatches, type sample, mock property card); navigates via window.ATOMICITY.openNode/askVi.

atomicity/Explore.jsx.name: Explore.jsx
atomicity/Explore.jsx.description: AcExplore (window.AcExplore) — click-to-select hotspots on a mock property-card Canvas, calls CV_EXPLORE.variations() to generate N style recipes, like/dislike voting drives CV_EXPLORE.tasteProfile(), 'promote' commits chosen recipe as a new Type via CV_HOST/CV_REGISTRY; also renders a persisted gallery of promoted atoms.

atomicity/explore-engine.js.name: explore-engine.js
atomicity/explore-engine.js.description: window.CV_EXPLORE — builds an LLM prompt (via CV_AI.complete) requesting N distinct style-recipe JSON objects for a UI element, salvages/parses the JSON, exposes styleFor()/variations()/promote()/tasteProfile()/gallery (localStorage-persisted) and registers explore.variations/promote/run capabilities into CV_AI.

atomicity/mode-engine.js.name: mode-engine.js
atomicity/mode-engine.js.description: window.CV_MODE — a register/get/all/query/activate/subscribe registry for interaction 'modes' (click behavior + cursor + behaviours); ships two built-ins, 'operator' (normal click-nav) and 'inspect' (persistent CV_PICK loop feeding selections to Vi), reflects active mode via document.documentElement[data-mode] and pushes mode.behaviours into CV_AI.setActiveBehaviours.

atomicity/scan-engine.js.name: scan-engine.js
atomicity/scan-engine.js.description: window.CV_SCAN — pluggable source(resolve)×extractor(regex) scanner that periodically (setInterval, default 45s) rebuilds indexes over CSSOM/manifest-referenced files/curated app CSS/optionally a real repo tree (via CV_HOST); built-in extractors for var(--token) usage, @dsCard/@template tags, and TODO/FIXME comments; exposes usage()/todos()/tags()/stats()/describe().

atomicity/index.html.name: index.html
atomicity/index.html.description: Boot page for the standalone AtomiCity app — loads React/ReactDOM/Babel from unpkg + this project's icon lib, registries (CV_REGISTRY/CV_AI/CV_HOST), the _ds_bundle.js compiled components, then all atomicity/*.js and *.jsx (Babel in-browser) files in dependency order, aliases some icon names, calls ATLAS.init()+_wire(), CV_SCAN.start(), and mounts <AtomiCity/> into #atomicity; catches boot errors and renders them inline.

atomicity/vi-brain.js.name: vi-brain.js
atomicity/vi-brain.js.description: window.VI_BRAIN — assembles Vi's system prompt (architecture blurb + live ATLAS.census() + current node/picked-element context + learned preferences), calls CV_AI.complete for interpret(message,ctx,history) returning {say, actions[], proposals[], options[]} parsed from a fenced ```atomicity JSON block, stages 'propose' actions via CV_HOST.commit, provides suggestions()/quickCommands() and a learn(feedback) pipeline that distills feedback into a durable CV_AI behaviour entry (persisted in localStorage + staged via CV_HOST).

atomicity/atomicity.css.name: atomicity.css
atomicity/atomicity.css.description: Stylesheet for the whole AtomiCity app (top bar, tree rail, detail pane, hero band, Vi console panel/chat bubbles, command bar (⌘K), AcKit primitives (Specimen/StateDot/Tile/Sheet/HumanControl), Foundations workbench (fz2-*), Ingest layout (ig-*)); built entirely from CSS custom properties (var(--...)), no raw color/shadow literals per its own header claim.

atomicity/ingest.js.name: ingest.js
atomicity/ingest.js.description: window.CV_SOURCE — ingestion registry: addSource()/list()/update() over a localStorage-persisted corpus; registerRecognizer 'by-shape' heuristically types a source (stylesheet/brand-guide/voice-sample/deck/data/notes/palette-image) from filename/content; registerAnalyzer 'palette' (canvas pixel-bucket extraction for images), 'vision-read' (LLM vision, no-ops without a connected vision provider), and 'deep-read' (CV_AI.complete with DEEP_PROMPT to mine text for color/type/voice/structure/value/motif findings + optional CV_HOST proposals); bringForward()/bringAll() stage findings' proposals via CV_HOST.commit.

atomicity/Atlas.jsx.name: Atlas.jsx
atomicity/Atlas.jsx.description: AcTree/AcDetail/AcBody (window.AcTree, window.AcDetail) — renders the ATLAS projection model as a collapsible left tree + a right detail pane that switches render per node.kind (token/card/component/template/ai-entry/type/runtime/serializer/change/etc.), ends every detail view with a 'What Vi can do here' chip row from VI_BRAIN.suggestions(); also exports EnvCheck (window.EnvCheck), a live capability-status panel reading CV_HOST.describe()/CV_SCAN.describe().

atomicity/Foundations.jsx.name: Foundations.jsx
atomicity/Foundations.jsx.description: AcFoundations (window.AcFoundations) — a plain-language brand-editing workbench: hardcoded FACETS (Palette/Type/Roundness/Depth/Spacing) each listing curated tokens with human names/descriptions; selecting a tile opens an Inspector sheet with a HumanControl editor that live-edits the CSS custom property on document.documentElement (window.__acFoundationEdits) and can 'Save to brand' via CV_HOST.commit(kind:'css.token'); includes a static LivePreview mock property card fed by the same tokens.

atomicity/Ingest.jsx.name: Ingest.jsx
atomicity/Ingest.jsx.description: AcIngest (window.AcIngest) — upload/paste UI over CV_SOURCE: Dropzone reads files (FileReader, images as dataURL) or pasted text into new sources, SourceView triggers CV_SOURCE.analyze() and lists findings grouped by dimension with 'Bring forward'/'Bring all forward' buttons that stage CV_HOST proposals.

atomicity/override.js.name: override.js
atomicity/override.js.description: window.CV_OVERRIDE — a live-style-persistence layer: stamps a picked DOM element with data-cv-ov="N" and writes/rewrites a real CSSOM rule (with !important) in a dedicated <style id=cv-override-sheet> so inline-style edits survive React re-renders; apply()/clear()/clearAll()/get()/list(), plus snapshotStyles()/diff() for before/after comparisons used by Vi.

atomicity/VoiceSurface.jsx.name: VoiceSurface.jsx
atomicity/VoiceSurface.jsx.description: Defines AcVoice (window.AcVoice), a copywriting surface over fixed MOMENTS (button/headline/insight/empty/error) that calls CV_AI capability 'voice.write' (registered here) to generate 4 copy options per moment and 'Save to voice' stages a CV_HOST proposal (kind ai.entry); own header comment reads '// atomicity/Voice.jsx' [header stale — filename mismatch].

atomicity/atlas-model.js.name: atlas-model.js
atomicity/atlas-model.js.description: window.ATLAS — derives the entire navigable tree purely from live sources: fetches ../_ds_manifest.json plus reads window.CV_REGISTRY/CV_AI/CV_HOST/CV_SCAN, building tokenNodes()/cardNodes()/componentNodes()/templateNodes()/registryNodes() into one root TREE; exposes init()/rebuild()/find()/pathTo()/search()/census() and _wire() which resubscribes to CV_REGISTRY/CV_HOST changes to auto-rebuild (never resubscribes to CV_AI to avoid a navigate/rebuild loop, per inline comment).

atomicity/picker.js.name: picker.js
atomicity/picker.js.description: window.CV_PICK — document-wide element picker: on start(cb) tracks mousemove to spotlight (bounding-box overlay + role label) the element under the cursor via elementFromPoint, roleOf() heuristically classifies it (button/heading/card/image/badge/value/link/field/icon/navigation/element) by tag+class regex, click captures a describe() payload (role, tag, text, size, layout, box, computed styles, child roles) and hands {descriptor, el} to the callback; Escape/stop() tears down listeners; excludes AtomiCity's own chrome elements.

atomicity/kit.jsx.name: kit.jsx
atomicity/kit.jsx.description: window.AcKit — shared primitive components: Specimen (renders a token's visual truth — swatch/rounded box/spacing bars/shadowed card/font sample — by kind), StateDot (SVG idle/selected/active/edited morph), Tile, Sheet (closable bottom panel with Escape-to-close), Field (labelled wrapper), HumanControl (adaptive layperson editor: color picker swatch, range slider for radius/spacing, plain text fallback), and OptionRow (equal-width quick-reply button grid used for Vi's dynamic next-move options).

atomicity/shot.js.name: shot.js
atomicity/shot.js.description: window.CV_SHOT — screenshot capture/memory using lazy-loaded snapdom (@zumer/snapdom CDN, not html2canvas despite this file's own header comment naming html2canvas [header stale]); snapshot(el)/snapshotPage() capture PNG dataURLs, remember() keeps a FIFO-capped (default 8, adjustable 1-40) image history, aroundChange() captures before/after around a callback for visual diffing; registers CV_AI capabilities shot.setLimit and vision.diff (the latter throws without a connected vision provider).

atomicity/AtomiCity.jsx.name: AtomiCity.jsx
atomicity/AtomiCity.jsx.description: window.AtomiCity — the root component wiring AcTree+AcDetail+ViConsole+AcCommandBar together; owns selected-node/expanded/picked-element state, implements the act(a) verb dispatcher (open/expand/highlight/search/connect/ingest/explore/restyle/run) that Vi's returned actions execute against the real interface, exposes window.ATOMICITY = {act, openNode, askVi, startPick, setVi, setPicked, pickElement}, wires ⌘K (command bar) and ⌘E (toggle inspect mode) global shortcuts, and renders ModeSwitch (a CV_MODE projection) in the top bar.

atomicity/ViConsole.jsx.name: ViConsole.jsx
atomicity/ViConsole.jsx.description: window.ViConsole — the chat UI for Vi: floating FAB + slide-in panel with Chat/Teach/Memory modes; send() in chat mode calls VI_BRAIN.interpret() and auto-executes returned actions (opens nodes, or for 'restyle' captures before/after screenshots via CV_SHOT + applies via CV_OVERRIDE + gets CV_AI 'vision.diff' feedback), in teach mode calls VI_BRAIN.learn(); renders message bubbles with action-chip buttons, staged-proposal chips, before/after image pairs, follow-up text, and OptionRow quick replies; also shows a picked-element chip and a shot-memory limit stepper wired to CV_SHOT.setLimit.

_qa/views-test.html.name: views-test.html
_qa/views-test.html.description: Proves CV_PROJECT.toCollection turns a view node (query+projector) into live rows; checks reactivity (new kind auto-appears), palette-row click wiring to CV_ACTIONS via onPick, and selection-as-node.

_qa/vi-glyph-test.html.name: vi-glyph-test.html

_qa/bridge-test.html.name: bridge-test.html

_qa/popover-test.html.name: popover-test.html
_qa/popover-test.html.description: Loads real Popover/Tooltip/Select .jsx via fetch+Babel eval and mounts a Select + hover Tooltip to confirm CV_POPOVER.place/Component exist and the components render without error.

_qa/meta-test.html.name: meta-test.html
_qa/meta-test.html.description: Proves the self-building layer: CV_QUERY derive-by-query, meta-actions (define-kind/add-field/relate/define-rule/define-axis/define-decorator/define-trigger) mutating the registry live, CV_EVENTS attention-to-highlight rules, undo-as-inverse, and macros-as-actions.

_qa/glyphic-test.html.name: glyphic-test.html
_qa/glyphic-test.html.description: Exercises CV_MEANING (context-profile token/meaning lookup incl. profile switching) and CV_GLYPHIC (form/texture values, validate, symbol search, render) then renders 6 composed glyphic specs.

_qa/cv-node-test.html.name: cv-node-test.html
_qa/cv-node-test.html.description: Proves CV_NODE's unification: all kinds (token/glyphic/Type/component/panel/slide) lens to one canonical shape, value- and thing-sockets share one accepts/candidates call, and resolve()/render() recurse and dispatch across radii (token, glyphic, wildcard).

_qa/mark-compare.html.name: mark-compare.html
_qa/mark-compare.html.description: Side-by-side visual diff harness: source brand-mark PNGs vs CV_SHAPES.markSVG-rendered SVG for userPortal/propertyWizard/virtualHubs/vi, to eyeball fidelity of the vector redraws.

_qa/decorators-test.html.name: decorators-test.html
_qa/decorators-test.html.description: Proves CV_DECORATORS: catalogues the @decorator vocabulary (>=18), shows derive() reads existing fields by reference (no copy), find() searches by decorator, condition/editable/requires-forbids behaviors, ctx-threaded cross-layer conditions, and tokens-as-nodes view.

_qa/core-test.html.name: core-test.html
_qa/core-test.html.description: Renders ContainmentTree at 3 LODs (summary/pitch/full) from one spec, plus DiagramSolver on hub/pipeline/quadrant graph types, loading the real .jsx via Babel — visual proof, no pass/fail assertions.

_qa/zone-probe.html.name: zone-probe.html
_qa/zone-probe.html.description: Minimal probe rendering divs colored by each --zone-*-surface CSS custom property (base/content/panel/review/source/package/success/warning/reject/vi) to check the token set resolves.

_qa/perpart-test.html.name: perpart-test.html
_qa/perpart-test.html.description: Proves CV_GLYPHIC.compose supports per-part styling (color/texture/motion independently on ring/fill/symbol) alongside legacy flat-spec and whole-glyph motion, rendered as a row of glyphs.

_qa/operator-controls-test.html.name: operator-controls-test.html
_qa/operator-controls-test.html.description: Loads real .jsx for Toast/Sheet/List/Menu/Checkbox/Radio/AppShell/Table/Search/Skeleton via fetch+Babel and runs behavioral assertions (queueing, dismiss, keyboard nav, aria attrs, click handlers) against live DOM.

_qa/frame-probe.html.name: frame-probe.html
_qa/frame-probe.html.description: Minimal probe rendering divs sized by --frame-deck-16x9/-3x2, --frame-a4-p, and --frame-mobile-p width/height tokens to check the frame-dimension token set resolves.

_qa/glyph-only.html.name: glyph-only.html
_qa/glyph-only.html.description: Static side-by-side SVG comparison of the same glyph path rendered with fill-rule evenodd vs nonzero — visual-only, no assertions.

_qa/studio-test.html.name: studio-test.html
_qa/studio-test.html.description: Proves the Studio substrate: CV_VARS variable resolution ({{}}, {var}, {op:coalesce}), CV_ACTIONS invoke mutating live nodes + loud failure on missing params, CV_PROJECT's inspector/tool-schema coherence (UI actions === AI tool names), and the chat/voice→action loop with generatable resolved via CV_AI query.

_qa/cr-test.html.name: cr-test.html
_qa/cr-test.html.description: Renders every newly added archetype (product-cover, dashboard, orbital, manifold, fidelity, etc.) from its registered defaults, plus 6 new diagram sub-types (orbital/stacked/spectrum/manifold/fidelity/hub) through DiagramSolver — visual proof, no assertions.

analysis/SYSTEM-MAP-EDITOR-ADAPTER.md.name: SYSTEM-MAP-EDITOR-ADAPTER.md
analysis/SYSTEM-MAP-EDITOR-ADAPTER.md.description: Contract for the System Map's visual editor: the op-queue JSON schema it emits (create/rename/move/archive/delete) and the disk-write adapter algorithm to replay it.

analysis/landing-mockups.md.name: landing-mockups.md

analysis/README.md.name: README.md
analysis/README.md.description: Short entry doc for the analysis/ folder: the 6-step workflow and 9-level lens for extracting DNA rules from source decks (points to HANDOFF.md as primary).

analysis/HANDOFF.md.name: HANDOFF.md
analysis/HANDOFF.md.description: Master onboarding brief for a new build session: mission/mindset, full repo map, token/type conventions, generative-core status, traps/gotchas, and what's done vs next.

analysis/SKINS.md.name: SKINS.md
analysis/SKINS.md.description: Decomposes reference glass/stone board images onto system axes (material/skin mechanism), lists 15 gap items vs current generated output, and an asset/3D-lighting brief for texture/render deliverables.

analysis/DIAGRAMS.md.name: DIAGRAMS.md
analysis/DIAGRAMS.md.description: Defines a hierarchical diagram type system (10 diagram types/subtypes, node/edge/axis schema, icons as content) that the graph solver/generator implements.

analysis/recent-pitches.md.name: recent-pitches.md

analysis/GUIDE.md.name: GUIDE.md
analysis/GUIDE.md.description: Method doc: step-by-step procedure (ingest, 9-level lens, pixel sampling, diff-tagging, synthesis) for analysing each new source-material folder consistently.

analysis/UNIFICATION-SWEEP.md.name: UNIFICATION-SWEEP.md
analysis/UNIFICATION-SWEEP.md.description: Audit table of every DS law × every consumer surface (wired / unwired / partial), a priority order to close gaps, and out-of-scope connections needing other actors.

analysis/AUDIT-SLICE1.md.description: Token audit slice: keeps logo gold #E0C010 + bronze as-is, adds --ramp-* as new stops, defers zone-ladder retune, lists hardcoded gold/bronze consumers to fix.

analysis/BLOCKS.md.name: BLOCKS.md
analysis/BLOCKS.md.description: Specifies the Block component (the container analogue of Glyphic): parts/slots/sockets, containment-ladder coordinates, material axis, ordered action sockets, and file homes.

analysis/SYSTEM-GAPS.md.name: SYSTEM-GAPS.md
analysis/SYSTEM-GAPS.md.description: Raw running log of DNA findings not yet in the design system, organized by confirmation confidence (2/3/4/5+ folders), feeding SYNTHESIS-PLAN once graduated.

analysis/REQUIREMENTS.md.name: REQUIREMENTS.md
analysis/REQUIREMENTS.md.description: Living spec of confirmed requirements (A-G categories: fidelity, structure, axes, reuse/generation, motion, interactivity, output surfaces) the design system must satisfy, each tagged by confidence.

analysis/FRONTEND-REPLACEMENT-INVENTORY..name: FRONTEND-REPLACEMENT-INVENTORY.md
analysis/FRONTEND-REPLACEMENT-INVENTORY..description: Joins the two mechanism/knowledge reports into a replacement plan: identifies 3 frontend surfaces, the mechanism contract to preserve, and gaps claude-ds still lacks (operator components, archetype renderers).

analysis/UNIFICATION.md.name: UNIFICATION.md
analysis/UNIFICATION.md.description: Maps and resolves the duplication between two disconnected halves (the CV_REGISTRY type system and the core rule-engine solvers) via a typeToNode bridge, tracking weld stages W1-W7 status.

analysis/AUDIT-INDEX.md.name: AUDIT-INDEX.md
analysis/AUDIT-INDEX.md.description: Whole-system content-type map + 10 reconciliation tensions where v1 docs (README) understate the source DNA (flat gold, no texture/motion, etc).

analysis/SYNC-STATE.md.name: SYNC-STATE.md
analysis/SYNC-STATE.md.description: Reconciliation log between the repo and the cloud 'ConceptV Design System' project: what synced, what stayed cloud-only (binaries), and final full-sync confirmation with a later repo→cloud push.

analysis/PROGRESS.md.name: PROGRESS.md
analysis/PROGRESS.md.description: Tracker table (all 12 source folders analysed) plus a chronological session log narrating each analysis/build pass and its headline findings.

analysis/pitch-deck.md.name: pitch-deck.md
analysis/pitch-deck.md.description: The deepest baseline analysis (3 passes) of the 17pp pitch-deck: establishes the near-white zoning ladder, gold/bronze ramp, grid ratios, atom catalogue, colour-role logic, and restraint guardrails that all later folders are tested against.

analysis/INTEGRATION.md.name: INTEGRATION.md
analysis/INTEGRATION.md.description: The anti-drift wiring contract: one home per concept across 4 registries (tokens/types/engine/AI), the L0/L1/L2 token-layer rule, and how new things must connect without duplicating.

analysis/SYNTHESIS-PLAN.md.name: SYNTHESIS-PLAN.md
analysis/SYNTHESIS-PLAN.md.description: Bridges confirmed analysis findings to concrete build steps (token recalibration, container architecture, template library, motion, deck→app bridge), ordered by readiness with a capstone build order.

analysis/_TEMPLATE.md.name: _TEMPLATE.md
analysis/_TEMPLATE.md.description: Blank 9-level lens template (frame/grid/zoning/type/colour/atoms/layout/construction/responsive) to be copied per new source-folder analysis.

analysis/GL-SECTORS.md.name: GL-SECTORS.md
analysis/GL-SECTORS.md.description: Ledger of 10 defects in the WebGL 'stone' plane vs the CSS reference (alpha bug, geometry not from block IR, missing thickness/materials/lighting/shadows), with an attack order.

analysis/COMPANY-FRONTEND-MECHANISMS.md.name: COMPANY-FRONTEND-MECHANISMS.md
analysis/COMPANY-FRONTEND-MECHANISMS.md.description: Inventories the company frontend's live mechanisms (3 served surfaces, API/route table, address spine, SSE contract, per-view mechanism-vs-presentation verdicts) that any claude-ds replacement must preserve.

analysis/vt-family.md.name: vt-family.md
analysis/vt-family.md.description: Analysis of the vt-* A4 one-pager family + vi-onepager: confirms the print surface and tight-LOD end, and proves client/audience is a template parameter (identical layout, different client content).

analysis/AXES.md.name: AXES.md
analysis/AXES.md.description: Defines the parametric model: orthogonal axes (surface/LOD/register/theme/density/tint) computing design over an invariant core, plus the containment-hierarchy/zoning-as-depth and block+graph solver unification.

analysis/LANGUAGE.md.name: LANGUAGE.md
analysis/LANGUAGE.md.description: Founding spec for the Glyphic visual language: meaning-as-combinatorial-field across facets (form/symbol/fill/color/texture/edge), the one meaning-registry home, and its verified status.

analysis/AXIS-REFACTOR.md.name: AXIS-REFACTOR.md
analysis/AXIS-REFACTOR.md.description: Plans/logs the Axis-system refactor: one CV_AXIS-shaped registry per visual axis (motion/color/space/size/form/texture/depth/fill/symbol/meaning), status log of what's built.
