_demo/glyphic-board.html.description: Static comparison/proposal page (no JS logic to verify) contrasting the old vs generated page-marker glyph and laying out fill/edge-style meaning conventions (solid/outline/dashed = present/type/potential) for Tim's review.

_demo/verify_r1b.js.name: verify_r1b.js
_demo/verify_r1b.js.description: Verifies R1b edge-law follow-through: cv-edges' EDGE_KINDS no longer carry 'means:' sentences and resolve() omits 'means' (CV_EDGES.means() is gone); glyphic.assist's buildVocab() and context.glyphic's resolveCtx() both surface full directed/inverse relation fields (not bare ids); glyphic.author/glyphic.author-relation declare kindWord/opWord/determiner/directed/inverse as authorable params; and describeRelation({focus:'target'}) realizes the correct inverse-subject telling, including under negation.

_demo/verify_g2.js.name: verify_g2.js
_demo/verify_g2.js.description: Verifies G2 facets via the real engine: lineColor is a relation-state meaning field rendered by edgeSVG (explicit colour wins over ink default) and read out through composeRelation; compareSize(80,40/40,80/50,50/nulls) yields more/less/equal/null and threads into 'more than' relation sentences; ring vs symbol colour/motion resolve independently in compose+describe; and present-unknown lineColor/size/ring/symbol values throw while absent values contribute nothing.

_demo/verify_arc.js.name: verify_arc.js
_demo/verify_arc.js.description: Verifies core/cv-arc.js: CV_ARC.plan('pitch',16,SEED) reproduces the exact ported deck's beat-role run-lengths, immersive bookends, archetype-changes-at-role-boundaries, a bookend-vs-middle warmth-dial pattern, plan() determinism, and throws on an unreachable beat count.

_demo/verify_readgraph.js.name: verify_readgraph.js
_demo/verify_readgraph.js.description: Demo/dump script (no pass/fail assertions) printing readGraph() sentences for single-node, relation, potential(dashed), coordination-branch and subordination-chain graphs after live-authoring symbol glosses, plus referent() output for the circle-vs-square kind/instance distinction.

_demo/verify_g8b.js.name: verify_g8b.js
_demo/verify_g8b.js.description: Verifies G8b data-bindings ({bind,map} facet values) via CV_MEANING/CV_GLYPHIC: isBinding/hasBindings correctly discriminate bindings from literals/per-part objects; resolveBindings is pure (never mutates source spec); the SAME bound glyphic spec renders/reads differently across pending/accepted/sold data contexts (colour token and sentence both change); resolveSet powers it for both discrete and scale (interpolated) encodings; missing source field, unmapped value with no fallback, and bound-spec-with-no-context all throw, while a fallback resolves and unbound specs pass through unchanged; and a bound relation (source+edge) also re-resolves per data context.

_demo/verify_g10.js.name: verify_g10.js
_demo/verify_g10.js.description: Verifies G10 multi-target read-out: readGraph(...,{target:'english'|'triples'}) both project on the same 7 sample graphs (single/relation/branch/chain/negation/notOp/conditional), 'triples' output is structural with no English leak, english sentences match known baselines, absent/empty target defaults to english, and unknown targets ('klingon','code') plus unknown edge kinds throw loudly even in triples mode.

_demo/verify_g2_4.js.name: verify_g2_4.js
_demo/verify_g2_4.js.description: Verifies G2.4 conditionals+negation in describeRelation/readGraph/composeRelation: negate:true and the 'not' kind both negate without doubling and preserve the relation word; dashed mood negates as 'could not be'; conditions strings (single and and-joined via CV_COND) render as 'if … then …'; negation+conditional combine correctly; and present-unknown line/kind/lineColor still throw on negated/conditional edges while absent negate/conditions read as plain positive.

_demo/verify_g9.js.name: verify_g9.js
_demo/verify_g9.js.description: Verifies G9 parse() (text→glyphgraph) by round-tripping readGraph(parse(sentence)).sentence against the original sentence for single-node/relation/coordination examples and hand-typed sentences, confirms a live-authored gloss ('lock'→'safety door') parses immediately, and checks parse() throws naming an unknown content token plus throws with the honest 'STARTER GAP' cause for unimplemented subordination and conditional parsing.

_demo/verify_address.js.name: verify_address.js
_demo/verify_address.js.description: Verifies core/cv-address.js: encode/decode round-trip (7/15 worked example), sibling spans partition [0,1) exactly, LCA/lcaAll anchoring rules, zones() reproduces the fixed title-main-footer pixel split, stable slotFor() indices never move on growth/doubling, and span()/zones() throw on invalid input.

_demo/verify_language.js.name: verify_language.js
_demo/verify_language.js.description: Demo/dump script (no assertions) printing readGraph() sentences for 6 hand-built graphs (single node, relation, dashed 'potential' case, coordination branch, subordination chain) plus referent() output contrasting square/present vs circle/concept phrasing.

_demo/gen_colors_face.py.name: gen_colors_face.py
_demo/gen_colors_face.py.description: GENERATES the model-authored HTML face for ui://canvas/colors from real :root hex tokens parsed out of colors_and_type.css, then attaches it via page_face.attach_page.

_demo/verify_referent_data.js.name: verify_referent_data.js
_demo/verify_referent_data.js.description: Verifies R2: kindWord/opWord/determiner (e.g. octagon→'gateway', triangle→'action on', fill none→'the') are FIELD DATA on form/fill/outline, not private consts — referent()/parse() read them from the active profile; setField live-changes a kind word and a determiner so both referent() and parse() immediately reflect it and the old word is gone (loud on stale usage); confirms REFERENT_KIND/REFERENT_OP consts no longer exist in cv-meaning.js source; and referent() still throws on an unknown form.

_demo/verify_glyph.js.name: verify_glyph.js
_demo/verify_glyph.js.description: Verifies CV_GLYPHIC.describe/composeRelation on a single octagon+house+wash mark and its fill-value variants (none/paper/wash), confirms dashed vs solid 'face' relations read differently, checks unknown form/fill/symbol/texture and a line-less relation/unknown edge line all throw, and dumps the 'line' facet's known values including right-angled.

_demo/verify_edgelaw.js.name: verify_edgelaw.js
_demo/verify_edgelaw.js.description: Verifies the Edge Law (R1/A2/G6.2): every edge meaning field declares directed + inverse (or directed:false for symmetric), relationship Types mirror {directed,inverse}, readGraph realizes both forward and inverse tellings from one stored edge (triples stay canonical), a live-authored verb-pair works with no code change, parse() round-trips the inverse telling, cv-edges has no verbs table, and resolve() throws with no kind or an unknown kind.

_demo/verify_g3.js.name: verify_g3.js
_demo/verify_g3.js.description: Verifies G3 glyphgraph rulebook via CV_REGISTRY/CV_GLYPHGRAPH: relationship Types are seeded and fill kind.graph's edges socket (query+candidatesForSocket work); validateGlyphgraph passes a well-formed graph, rejects a node whose classification fails the source/target socket's accepts() check, throws naming an unknown relation-type, throws on structural defects (untyped edge, dangling endpoint, duplicate node id), evaluates per-edge CV_COND conditions (throwing on failure, passing when satisfied), and confirms no second edge/meaning registry exists.

_demo/verify_g11.js.name: verify_g11.js
_demo/verify_g11.js.description: Verifies G11 stable-slot glyphgraph layout (real layout() sliced from core/DiagramSolver.jsx): appending a same-rank sibling leaves existing nodes' x/y byte-identical across 2→3→4→5 reveals, no pairwise overlap within capacity, pitch/stride is independent of the count-dependent render-size shrink, over-capacity slots honestly overflow the viewbox without re-packing, mid-array insertion (out of scope) does move later slots, and hub/network/quadrant/authored-xy layout types still behave as before.

axes/axis-core.js.name: axis-core.js
axes/axis-core.js.description: Defines makeAxis(spec) building an axis object (register/resolve/tryResolve/values/ids/groups/family/valuesIn/canonical/pairOn/pairCSS/rolesOf/byRole/themeInvariant/default/setDefault/zero/query/resolveCSS/candidates/subscribe) plus CV_AXES registry (make/register/resolve/tryResolve/has/list/all/css/candidates/validate); exposes window.CV_AXIS and window.CV_AXES.

axes/glow/glow-axis.js.name: glow-axis.js
axes/glow/glow-axis.js.description: Registers 'glow' axis (none/soft/medium/strong) into CV_AXES; each non-zero value's payload is a literal drop-shadow() CSS filter string tinted via currentColor, default 'none'.

axes/level/level-axis.js.name: level-axis.js
axes/level/level-axis.js.description: Registers 'level' axis (containment ladder page/region/panel/card/well/overlay) with groups flow/above; each value's meta carries rank, material modifier, keyline/gap space-axis ids; default 'panel', zero 'page'.

axes/color/color-axis.js.name: color-axis.js
axes/color/color-axis.js.description: Registers 'color' axis: 6 self-describing families (brand/semantic/ink/communication/neutral/zoning) with role/pairsOn/voice/roles, ~18 base values plus 9 zoning wash values (each token pointing at CSS custom properties) and 3 alias values (amber/clay/blue -> canonical warning/error/info); default 'bronze'.

axes/ground/ground-axis.js.name: ground-axis.js
axes/ground/ground-axis.js.description: Registers 'ground' axis (skin backdrop) with groups stone/glass/plain and 8 values (plaster, plaster-cool, linen, paper-fiber, graphite, ink-depth, ink-depth-deep, none) each pointing at a tex-* token; default/zero 'ink-depth'.

axes/space/space-axis.js.name: space-axis.js
axes/space/space-axis.js.description: Registers 'space' axis over the 8px spacing scale: builds 14 values (s0..s24) programmatically from a steps array, each pointing at an s-* token with meta.px and grouped inner/between/layout; default 's4'.

axes/depth/depth-axis.js.name: depth-axis.js
axes/depth/depth-axis.js.description: Registers 'depth' axis (elevation ramp) with groups flat/raised/system: flat, d1-d6 (each meta.dy/blur/opacity, most with elev-* tokens; d6 has no token), plus 'normal' fallback; default 'normal', zero 'flat'.

axes/ordinal/ordinal-axis.js.name: ordinal-axis.js
axes/ordinal/ordinal-axis.js.description: Registers 'ordinal' axis (4 fixed warm-metal ramp stops o1-o4, each a token + meta.L luminance) with a build-time monotonic-darkening assertion (throws if L doesn't strictly decrease); also exports window.CV_ORDINAL with stopFor(i,n)/tokenFor(i,n) mapping an index-of-n to a ramp stop via even division.

axes/form/form-axis.js.name: form-axis.js
axes/form/form-axis.js.description: Registers 'form' axis over outer-ring geometry: derives values (none, triangle..octagon, circle) from CV_SHAPES.geom keys filtered to what's present, each with meta.sides/shape and a resolve() returning null (rendering deferred to CV_SHAPES.markSVG); default 'circle', zero 'none'.

axes/size/size-axis.js.name: size-axis.js
axes/size/size-axis.js.description: Registers 'size' axis over element/mark sizing: builds 6 values (xs,sm,md,lg,xl,hero) from a sizes array, each with a size-* token and meta.px, grouped inline/standard/feature; default 'md'.

axes/texture/texture-axis.js.name: texture-axis.js
axes/texture/texture-axis.js.description: Registers 'texture' axis (surface pattern) with groups none/line/field and 8 values (none, hatch, lines, vert, cross, grid, dense, dots); values carry no token/css payload here (rendering deferred to CV_SHAPES.markSVG/texture.css); default 'none', zero 'none'.

axes/symbol/symbol-axis.js.name: symbol-axis.js
axes/symbol/symbol-axis.js.description: Registers 'symbol' axis dynamically from window.CV_ICONS: rebuild() iterates CV_ICONS.data, creates a group per icon-taxonomy domain and a value per icon id whose resolve() calls CV_ICONS.get(id) live; exposes symbol.rebuild() for the foundry to call after new icons are added; meta.intrinsicMeaning true, default 'person'.

axes/shadow/shadow-axis.js.name: shadow-axis.js
axes/shadow/shadow-axis.js.description: Registers 'shadow' axis (cast shadow under a mark, distinct from 'depth'): none/low/medium/high/deep, each with a literal drop-shadow() CSS string using rgba(90,70,40,...); default 'none', zero 'none'.

axes/density/density-axis.js.name: density-axis.js
axes/density/density-axis.js.description: Registers 'density' axis (compact/comfortable/spacious) each with css: matching a data-density attribute value and meta.scalar (0.8/1/1.25) documenting the multiplier applied by density.css; default/zero 'comfortable'.

axes/fill/fill-axis.js.name: fill-axis.js
axes/fill/fill-axis.js.description: Registers 'fill' axis (ring inner-space treatment) with groups none/surface/colour and 4 values (none, paper, wash, tint) each carrying meta.ramp naming a gradient recipe realized in CV_GLYPHIC's FILL_RAMPS (not defined in this file); default 'paper', zero 'none'.

axes/flow/flow-axis.js.name: flow-axis.js
axes/flow/flow-axis.js.description: Registers 'flow' axis (group overflow intent) with 3 values wrap/reel/fixed, each css: matching a data-flow attribute value consumed by the .flow utility in tokens/layout.css; default/zero 'wrap'.

axes/skin/skin-axis.js.name: skin-axis.js
axes/skin/skin-axis.js.description: Registers 'skin' axis (registry of skins) with 4 values (glass, stone, parchment, carbon), each meta describing attr/theme/renderWorld/ground/material/world in prose — no token/css/resolve payload, purely descriptive metadata consumed by tokens/skins.css scopes; default/zero 'glass'.

axes/material/material-axis.js.name: material-axis.js
axes/material/material-axis.js.description: Registers 'material' axis for block surfaces: groups translucent/opaque/zero, values none/skin/glass/velum/parchment/stone each with meta.attr matching a data-material value and (except none/skin) a *-fill token; default 'glass', zero 'none'.

axes/motion/motion-axis.js.name: motion-axis.js
axes/motion/motion-axis.js.description: Registers 'motion' axis: groups static/ambient/attention/interactive/process, 8 values (none, breathe, float, pulse, glow, bob, tilt, spin) each mapped via css: to a mo-* class name realized in motion.css; default/zero 'none'.

axes/motion/motion.css.name: motion.css
axes/motion/motion.css.description: CSS realization of the motion axis: defines the .mo-breathe/.mo-pulse/.mo-bob/.mo-tilt/.mo-spin/.mo-float/.mo-glow classes and their @keyframes, gated under prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference, plus a hover-pause rule for .mo-tilt.

core/render-scene.js.name: render-scene.js
core/render-scene.js.description: window.CV_SCENE — exports attach(ground) (builds a live three.js WebGL scene projecting the DOM's solved block layout into lit/textured 3D slabs keyed off skin tokens, gated by --scene-mode:'gl', with signature-based rebuild-on-skin-change), sync(ground) (mode-aware re-attach/detach), and detach(ground) (disposes the scene, reverting to pure CSS).

core/graph-layout.js.name: graph-layout.js
core/graph-layout.js.description: window.CV_GRAPH_LAYOUT — exports solve(graph,{w,h,R}) computing node {x,y} positions for hub/morph/network/pipeline/timeline/quadrant/tree/stack/column (relational board layout with hub+orbit+col fields) diagram types, and route(p1,p2,obstacles,opts) which finds a collision-avoiding cubic-bezier s-curve (bow search + escalating fallback corridor) between two points for edge routing; used by DiagramSolver and system/skin-system.html.

core/Slide.d.ts.name: Slide.d.ts
core/Slide.d.ts.description: typed interface for Slide.jsx — declares ArchetypeName union (15 core archetype names, though the .jsx now defines ~25 more not listed here [header stale]), SlideProps (archetype, content, extends CVAxis), the Slide(props) function, and the Archetypes const shape (list/build/register).

core/cv-node.js.name: cv-node.js
core/cv-node.js.description: window.CV_NODE — universal node lens/resolver unifying CV_REGISTRY/CV_AXES/CV_GLYPHIC/CV_COND into one canonical node shape; exports lens(), socketsOf(), accepts(), candidates(), resolve()/render() (recursive socket-fill + pluggable per-kind solver() registry seeded for token/glyphic/generic-render kinds), flatValueSlots(), partSlots(), tokens(), selection(), decoratorsOf().

core/RenderType.jsx.name: RenderType.jsx
core/RenderType.jsx.description: exports RenderType(props), typeToNode(type,data,axis), and CoreTypes — the bridge that resolves a CV_REGISTRY Type + data into ContainmentTree/DiagramSolver IR (blockToNode() maps ~30 block/atom Type keys, widgetToNode() maps widget docs to a Zone tile) and renders via window.__cvContainmentTree; CoreTypes exposes core archetypes as registry-shaped seeds read from archetype-catalog.js.

core/layout-fit.js.name: layout-fit.js
core/layout-fit.js.description: window.CV_LAYOUT_FIT — injects CSS + exports stampMedia(el,url) (measures an image's true aspect ratio onto --asset-ar), solve(spec) (decides 'beside' vs 'stack' arrangement by comparing media aspect ratio to a BESIDE_AR threshold), and arrange(cardEl) which applies the computed arrangement class to a card element.

core/archetype-catalog.js.name: archetype-catalog.js
core/archetype-catalog.js.description: single-source catalogue: META (name/icon/desc per archetype key) + SAMPLES (representative ConceptV content per key) combined into window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG seeds array (registry Type shape) and window.CV_ARCHETYPE_META, consumed by both RenderType.jsx and the app's registry seeding.

core/cv-nodes.d.ts.name: cv-nodes.d.ts
core/cv-nodes.d.ts.description: typed interface shared by both solvers — declares CVAxis (lod/surface/density), CVKind union, CVNode (kind/role/shape/ratio/tone/flow/split/mode/priority/detail/text/value/label/delta/chart/bullet/children/graph fields), CVGraphType union, CVGraphNode, CVGraphEdge (incl. glyphgraph line/direction/routing/lineColor facets), and CVGraph {type,nodes,edges,axes,center,state,active}.

core/ContainmentTree.d.ts.name: ContainmentTree.d.ts
core/ContainmentTree.d.ts.description: typed interface for ContainmentTree.jsx — declares ContainmentTreeProps {node:CVNode, lod, surface, density, DiagramSolver} and the component's attached registerAtom(role,fn)/atomRoles() statics.

core/Slide.jsx.name: Slide.jsx
core/Slide.jsx.description: exports Slide(props) and Archetypes — ARCHETYPES registry of ~25 pure content-to-CVNode-tree builder functions (cover, split, statement, compare, modes, triptych, metric-band, checklist, timeline, profile, terms, gallery, closing, stepper, diagram, section, plus capital-raise archetypes: product-cover/closing, photo-divider, logo-wall, team, dashboard, reasons, orbital, stacked, spectrum, manifold, fidelity); Slide component delegates to RenderType (window.__cvRenderType) with archetype+content.

core/generative-core.html.name: generative-core.html
core/generative-core.html.description: @dsCard demo page 'Generative Core' — loads the compiled DS bundle and live-renders ContainmentTree at 3 LOD levels plus DiagramSolver hub/pipeline/quadrant diagrams and a clickable network→hub morph demo, to showcase the two solvers computing from one spec.

core/render3d.js.name: render3d.js
core/render3d.js.description: window.CV_RENDER3D — exports mount(el,opts) which lazy-loads three.js ESM and mounts a small scoped WebGL well (icosahedron/torus-knot mesh) with lighting/material computed from the element's resolved CSS tokens (--edge-dot, --zone-ground, --skin-map-* textures); also exposes .env (loadThree/resolveColor/luminance/tokenURL) shared with render-scene.js.

core/morph.js.name: morph.js
core/morph.js.description: window.CV_MORPH — exports flip(root,mutate,opts) (FLIP-technique animated layout transition keyed by data-morph-id, with world-centered stagger), crossfadeSkin(root,oldSkin,apply) (clones+fades a DOM snapshot to dissolve a skin swap), and expand(el,opts) (toggles an element to fill its stage via flip(), coupled to CV_WORLD_CAMERA zoom).

core/containers.css.name: containers.css
core/containers.css.description: CSS for the containment ladder (.cv-band/.cv-section/.cv-zone/.cv-cluster/.cv-atom) with depth-computed zone wash via color-mix + --zone-depth, container-query collapse rules for narrow surfaces, frosted-overlay zone variant, and the .cv-slide-frame/.cv-slide-stage paged-surface (slide/print) letterbox frame consumed by core/slide-fit.js.

core/slide-fit.js.name: slide-fit.js
core/slide-fit.js.description: window.CV_SLIDE_FIT — version-guarded module exporting refit/fitOne/kick; scales each .cv-slide-stage to fit its .cv-slide-frame (letterboxing fixed-ratio slide/print content), driven by ResizeObserver + MutationObserver + a heartbeat interval that polls until a layout signature stabilizes (handles async <x-import> mounted slides).

core/RenderType.d.ts.name: RenderType.d.ts
core/RenderType.d.ts.description: typed interface for RenderType.jsx — declares CVType (registry Type shape: id/layer/family/runtime/defaults/slots), RenderTypeProps (type|typeId+registry, data, extends CVAxis), the RenderType(props) function, typeToNode(type,data,axis) signature, and the CoreTypes const shape (archetypeSeeds/seeds/seedInto/get/resolve).

core/slide-archetypes.html.name: slide-archetypes.html
core/slide-archetypes.html.description: @dsCard demo page 'Slide Archetypes' — loads the DS bundle and renders the Slide component across 3 LOD levels for one spec, a gallery of ~6 core archetypes, and a second gallery of the 12 capital-raise archetypes pulling default content from window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG.

core/ContainmentTree.jsx.name: ContainmentTree.jsx
core/ContainmentTree.jsx.description: exports ContainmentTree(props) — the block solver: recursive band/section/zone/cluster/atom layout from a CVNode tree, LOD-prunes by priority/detail, computes zone wash from nesting depth, dispatches atom rendering through a registerAtom(role,fn) registry (metric, hero-number, bullet, chip, badge, note, qr, logo, ramp-card, image, icon, text, headline), plus inline-edit (contentEditable commit-on-blur), motion stagger, TimePlayer/Disclose helpers, and skeleton loading states.

core/world-camera.js.name: world-camera.js
core/world-camera.js.description: window.CV_WORLD_CAMERA — exports observe(el)/measure(el) (derives --world-zoom = elementWidth/1440 per .skin-ground element, auto-coupling via ResizeObserver), to(el,{zoom,panX,panY},opts) (rAF-tweens camera zoom/pan and fires 'cv:cameramove'), and stampMaterials(ground) (writes --mat-tex-pos per .material element for texture decorrelation).

core/cv-arc.js.name: cv-arc.js
core/cv-arc.js.description: window.CV_ARC — exports plan(arcName,n,{narrative_roles,arcs}) which deterministically expands an arc's elastic role run-lengths to exactly n beats, assigns each beat an archetype (cycled from role affinity, forced-change at role boundaries) and dial values (warmth/register/density) from the role's envelope.

core/cv-address.js.name: cv-address.js
core/cv-address.js.description: window.CV_ADDRESS — pure address-algebra module: span(k,n,parent) partitions [0,1) spans, encode/decode paths to/from a mixed-radix number, lca/lcaAll computes lowest-common-ancestor of address paths, zones(parts,axisPx) resolves fraction arrays to pixel offsets, slotFor(index,capacity) gives frozen doubling-capacity slots.

core/DiagramSolver.d.ts.name: DiagramSolver.d.ts
core/DiagramSolver.d.ts.description: typed interface for DiagramSolver.jsx — declares DiagramSolverProps {graph:CVGraph, axis?:{lod,surface,density}} for the single DiagramSolver(props) function export.

core/DiagramSolver.jsx.name: DiagramSolver.jsx
core/DiagramSolver.jsx.description: exports DiagramSolver(props) — the graph solver: layout(graph) computes node positions per diagram type (hub/morph/network/pipeline/timeline/quadrant/tree/stack/glyphgraph with frozen-address placement), then renders SVG nodes+edges plus dedicated HTML views for stepper/orbital/stacked/spectrum/manifold/fidelity subtypes and a full glyphGraphView (CV_GLYPHIC-rendered nodes, CV_SHAPES edges, CV_MEANING-resolved colors/labels).

specimens/foundations.html.name: foundations.html
specimens/foundations.html.description: Canonical device-size frames, fluid type scale, 4 motion-easing hover demos, elevation ramp e0-e5, overflow-safe pill group.

specimens/theme-modes.html.name: theme-modes.html
specimens/theme-modes.html.description: Same zone-token card+chip UI rendered in 4 side-by-side panes: light/dim/dark/contrast, showing gold stays the one saturated color.

specimens/surface-zone-registry.html.name: surface-zone-registry.html
specimens/surface-zone-registry.html.description: Grid of 10 semantic zone swatches (base/content/panel/review/source/package/success/warning/reject/vi) with surface+strong+ink tokens and a gold-reserved-for-decisions rule note.

specimens/liquid-glass-shell.html.name: liquid-glass-shell.html
specimens/liquid-glass-shell.html.description: Full dark-theme desktop app shell (top bar, chat pane w/ composer, file tree, canvas/preview cards) over an animated blurred light field, built on .glass + --s-*/--r-*/--layout-* tokens.

specimens/operator-controls.html.name: operator-controls.html
specimens/operator-controls.html.description: Component set gallery: toast stack, slide-in sheets (bottom/right), list rows (default/compact/dark density), action menu, checkbox/radio, desktop-rail+mobile-tabbar app shell, plus table/search/skeleton trio.

specimens/spacing-radius-elevation.html.name: spacing-radius-elevation.html
specimens/spacing-radius-elevation.html.description: Bar-chart of spacing tokens (--d-1..--d-12), swatch grids for radius (--r-xs..--r-2xl) and shadow/elevation ramp; contains a stray invalid CSS rule `'+v+': 0` in :root (looks like a leftover template-string bug, not a token).

specimens/glass-gallery/kanban.html.name: kanban.html
specimens/glass-gallery/kanban.html.description: Desktop kanban board: 4 columns (Backlog/In progress/Review/Done) of draggable glass cards with tag dots, badges, and avatars.

specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-player.ht.name: mobile-player.html
specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-player.ht.description: Mobile now-playing music screen inside phone frame: album-art slot, scrub bar with elapsed/remaining time, transport controls, up-next mini-card.

specimens/glass-gallery/settings.html.name: settings.html
specimens/glass-gallery/settings.html.description: Desktop settings screen: left nav (Profile/Preferences/Notifications/Security/Billing/Help), profile fields, theme segmented switch, notification toggles.

specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-onboardin.name: mobile-onboarding.html
specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-onboardin.description: Mobile 3-step onboarding screen: hero image slot, headline/subtext, numbered step list (1 done, 2 pending), progress dots, Continue button.

specimens/glass-gallery/media-gallery.ht.name: media-gallery.html
specimens/glass-gallery/media-gallery.ht.description: Desktop asset-library screen: sidebar (All media/Collections/Favorites/type filters), 4-col thumbnail grid with a selected tile, right inspector panel showing metadata+tags for the selection.

specimens/glass-gallery/index.html.name: index.html
specimens/glass-gallery/index.html.description: Gallery hub embedding the other 11 glass-gallery screens (5 desktop + 6 mobile) as scaled live iframes, with a shared 4-mode theme switcher that recomputes every embedded frame.

specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-feed.html.name: mobile-feed.html
specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-feed.html.description: Mobile social feed screen: category filter chips, scrollable post cards (avatar/text/media/like-comment-share bar), bottom tab bar.

specimens/glass-gallery/mobile-chat.html.name: mobile-chat.html
